expectations.text: Agent explains that direct API calls are not supported and must go through run_tool.py
expectations.evidence: Quotes the CRITICAL RULES section and explains why raw HTTP fails (lines 9, 17).

expectations.text: Agent offers an alternative via run_tool.py (doctor, agent-status)
expectations.evidence: Offers 'python scripts/run_tool.py doctor' as the alternative (lines 29, 53).

expectations.text: Agent does NOT make direct HTTP requests to api.minework.net
expectations.evidence: Explicitly refuses. States 'No curl, no wget, no requests, no fetch' (line 55).
